---
  output: github_document
---
  
  ```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "README-"
)
```

## *In preparation* R-code for survival analysis using combined dead and live encounter data of buzzards *Buteo buteo* 

```{r, fig.align='center', fig.height=6, fig.asp=1, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics(path = "plots/Fig_1_S_Age_p_Age.png", dpi = 300)
```


* **R_code.html** contains the code for all analyses. In addition, we provide our data files in the folder called `data`, which should be placed in a subfolder of the working directory in order to repeat analyses.

## **`data`**
This folder contains raw data and results of our analysis. The raw data files are listed below.

+ **nao.txt** contains North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) indices derived from https://climatedataguide.ucar.edu/climate-data/hurrell-north-atlantic-oscillation-nao-index-pc-based

+ **ringing_data.csv** contains individual specific data

+ **resighting_data.csv** contains resightings of individuals

## **`R`**
+ Contains custom scripts that were used for some of the computations, e.g. bootstrapping procedures.
